workshop.faq.customer.title: Personal customers FAQ
workshop.faq.business.title: Business customers FAQ
workshop.faq.bq1: Do you offer ongoing maintenance contracts for businesses?
workshop.faq.ba1: Yes, we offer monthly and annual maintenance contracts including regular visits, remote support, and priority handling.
workshop.faq.bq2: How many workstations can you handle simultaneously?
workshop.faq.ba2: No limit — we work with businesses of all sizes and can handle dozens of stations simultaneously with a professional team.
workshop.faq.bq3: Do you offer a defined SLA for businesses?
workshop.faq.ba3: Yes, business maintenance contracts include a clear SLA with guaranteed response time and service-level commitments.
workshop.faq.bq4: Can we receive a tax invoice for all services?
workshop.faq.ba4: Absolutely — every service includes a proper tax invoice, and we can set up a monthly consolidated billing agreement.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions of Use
terms.footerNote: For legal or business questions regarding these terms, contact us at
terms.s1.title: General & Contact Details
terms.s1.body:
The store is operated by "Aluf Computers" (hereinafter: "the Store"). Address: Herzl 102, Rishon LeZion | Phone: 053-3368048 | Email: sales@aluf.co.il.
These terms apply to all use of the website and to every purchase made on it or in the physical store. Browsing the site or placing an order constitutes full acceptance of these terms.
These terms are subject to the Consumer Protection Law 5741-1981 and the regulations thereunder.
terms.s2.title: Placing an Order & Transaction Confirmation (72-Hour Protection)
terms.s2.body:
Entering credit card details on the site does not constitute a completed transaction. The transaction is considered completed only after a tax invoice is issued and sent to the customer.
Pending status: From the moment an order is placed, the transaction is held under review for up to 72 business hours for stock verification, detail authentication and final payment approval.
Cancellation by the store: The store may cancel a transaction in cases of a significant clerical error (in price or description), force majeure (security situation, war), or if the product is out of stock. In such a case, the customer will be fully refunded with no cancellation fee.
terms.s3.title: Custom-Built Computers (Custom Build)
terms.s3.body:
A computer ordered and assembled in the lab according to a personal specification (Configuration) is considered "goods manufactured specifically for the consumer" under the Consumer Protection Law.
Right of cancellation: In accordance with the law, a transaction for a custom-built computer cannot be cancelled once assembly work has begun in the lab.
Labor fees: If the customer requests cancellation before delivery (at the store's sole discretion), the customer will be charged an assembly/disassembly fee of ₪400, in addition to statutory cancellation fees.
Software licenses (such as Windows) activated for the customer cannot be returned or cancelled under any circumstances.
terms.s4.title: Cancellation & Returns Policy (Off-the-Shelf Products)
terms.s4.body:
Cancellation window: A customer may cancel a transaction within 14 days of receiving the product or receiving the disclosure document (whichever is later).
Special populations: A customer with a disability, senior citizen (over 65), or new immigrant may cancel the transaction within 4 months of receiving the product, provided the transaction involved communication between the store and the customer.
Cancellation fees: For cancellation due to a change of mind (not due to a defect), a cancellation fee of 5% of the product price or ₪100 will be deducted (whichever is lower).
Exclusions: Cancellation is not available for activated software, products capable of duplication whose packaging has been opened, or specially manufactured products.
terms.s5.title: Delivery, Shipping & Self-Pickup
terms.s5.body:
Delivery times: 3–8 business days to the entered address.
Business days definition: Sunday through Thursday. Fridays, Saturdays, holiday eves and public holidays are not counted as business days.
Self-pickup: Available at Herzl 102, Rishon LeZion, free of charge.
Pickup condition: Pickup is permitted only after receiving an official notification (SMS/email) that the order is ready and after a tax invoice has been issued. Do not come to the store before receiving these confirmations.
terms.s6.title: Lab Services & Abandoned Equipment
terms.s6.body:
Data responsibility: The customer is responsible for fully backing up data on the device before handing it to the lab. The store will not be liable for any loss of data, software or settings resulting from inspection or repair.
Abandoned equipment: A customer who does not collect their equipment, or does not respond to the store's messages within 45 days of being contacted, will be deemed to have waived the equipment. The store may transfer such equipment for electronic recycling or donation at its discretion, with no compensation to the customer.
terms.s7.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.s7.body: Warranty for products is governed solely by the importer's or manufacturer's warranty certificate. The store shall not be liable for indirect, consequential or incidental damages (such as loss of profits, distress or reputational harm) directly or indirectly related to the product or delays in its delivery.
terms.s8.title: Privacy & Intellectual Property
terms.s8.body:
The store collects information solely for processing the transaction and uses analytics tools (such as Microsoft Clarity) to improve the browsing experience. The information is not transferred to third parties for external marketing purposes.
All intellectual property on the site (logo, graphics, texts) belongs exclusively to "Aluf Computers". Copying or using these contents without written permission is prohibited.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how Aluf Computers collects, uses, stores and protects the personal information of website users.
privacy.footerNote: This policy complies with the Privacy Protection Law 5741-1981. For legal questions contact
privacy.s1.title: Information Collection & Use
privacy.s1.body:
The company collects two main types of information:
Personal information: name, address, phone, email, payment details – solely for completing the transaction and delivering the product. Without these details, the purchase cannot be completed.
Non-personal information: IP address, browsing patterns and interaction data – for improving user experience, statistical analysis, security and fraud prevention.
We collaborate with Microsoft Clarity and Microsoft Advertising to record how the site is used through behavioral metrics, heatmaps and session replay.
privacy.s2.title: Data Security & Protection Against Attacks
privacy.s2.body:
The company employs reasonable and standard security measures (SSL/TLS encryption) to protect information.
Credit card details are not stored on the company's servers; they are sent in encrypted form to a secure payment processor (third party).
Despite strict security measures, the company cannot guarantee absolute protection against cyberattacks. In the event of unauthorized access where reasonable measures were taken, the user waives all claims against the company.
privacy.s3.title: Sharing Information with Third Parties
privacy.s3.body:
"Aluf Computers" commits that identifying customer details (name, phone, email) will not be transferred to any third party for external marketing purposes unrelated to the company's activities.
The company will share information only with: essential service providers (payment processors and shipping companies required to complete the purchase), analytics and marketing tools (Microsoft Clarity/Advertising), and for legal protection or mergers and acquisitions.
The company is not responsible for the privacy policies or security standards of external service providers.
privacy.s4.title: User Rights – Access, Correction & Deletion
privacy.s4.body:
Every user may:
• View personal information collected about them
• Request correction of the information
• Request deletion of the information

Requests should be submitted in writing to: sales@aluf.co.il
privacy.s5.title: Use of Cookies & Tracking Technologies
privacy.s5.body:
The site uses Cookies (first-party and third-party) and other tracking technologies for its proper operation, security and measuring product popularity.
Microsoft Clarity collects usage data to understand user activity and improve site performance. For more information, see Microsoft's Privacy Statement.
You can block cookies in your browser settings, but this may affect some site features.
privacy.s6.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.s6.body: The company may update this privacy policy from time to time. The binding version is the current version published on the site.
